summary_sections.heading: 🤖 AI HIGHLIGHTS
bullets: Google DeepMind's Gemini 2.0: Sets a new benchmark on multi-step reasoning, outperforming GPT-4o on 6 of 8 standard evals — analysts call it the closest challenge to OpenAI's lead yet.
Meta open-sources a vision model: Fine-tuned on synthetic data, cutting compute cost by 40% while matching closed-source accuracy on image classification benchmarks.

summary_sections.heading: 📊 BI & DATA HIGHLIGHTS
bullets: Snowflake launches natural language queries: Analysts can now write questions in plain English instead of SQL inside the dashboard builder — now in public beta.
Gartner 2025 BI report: 67% of enterprises plan to embed AI copilots into data workflows within 18 months, up from 31% last year.

summary_sections.heading: 💡 KEY TAKEAWAY
bullets: The gap between open and closed AI models is narrowing faster than expected. For BI teams, this means production-ready AI tooling is becoming accessible without enterprise contracts.

articles.title: Google DeepMind's Gemini 2.0 outperforms GPT-4o on reasoning benchmarks
articles.summary: Google DeepMind's latest Gemini 2.0 model has achieved state-of-the-art results on multi-step reasoning tasks, surpassing OpenAI's GPT-4o on six of eight standard evaluation benchmarks.

articles.title: Meta open-sources new vision model trained on synthetic data
articles.summary: Meta AI has released a new computer vision model that uses synthetic training data to cut compute requirements by 40% while maintaining competitive accuracy scores across standard benchmarks.

articles.title: Anthropic releases Claude's extended thinking mode to all users
articles.summary: Anthropic has made its extended thinking feature available to all Claude users, allowing the model to reason through complex problems step by step before delivering a final answer.

articles.title: Snowflake adds natural language query support to dashboard builder
articles.summary: Snowflake's latest update lets analysts query their data warehouses using plain English questions, automatically translating them into SQL and rendering results in the dashboard interface.

articles.title: Gartner: 67% of enterprises plan AI copilots in BI workflows by 2026
articles.summary: A new Gartner survey finds the majority of large enterprises plan to integrate AI assistants into their business intelligence and data analytics workflows within the next 18 months.

articles.title: dbt Labs launches semantic layer for cross-tool metric consistency
articles.summary: dbt Labs has announced a new semantic layer that allows data teams to define metrics once and have them consistently available across BI tools, notebooks, and AI applications.
